creator: imp@harmony.village.org
text:
In message <Pine.BSF.4.33.0108251147430.43644-100000@www.mmlab.cse.yzu.edu.tw> Tai-hwa Liang writes:
: About 4 hours ago, I re-cvsupped the latest version -- no kernel freeze
: during booting anymore with/without hw.pci.ignore_pcibios; however, the
: /dev/card0 device still cannot be found:

Right.  Since we can't get an interrupt, we fail to attach, which
leads to this.  I think we need a fallback mechanism...

Warner
